title: erysimum aciphyllum
intro: Erysimum aciphyllum, also known as Western wallflower, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Erysimum aciphyllum include its potential to reduce fever, improve respiratory issues, and support skin health, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Erysimum aciphyllum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used externally as a salve or poultice to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
